name: Number of Available Periods
description: Sets the number of available class periods that can be selected. (useful for organization)

name: Dark Elements
description: Sets the colors of the darkest parts of the app.

name: Somewhat Bright Elements
description: Sets the colors of the medium-brightness parts of the app.

name: Light Elements
description: Sets the colors of the lightest parts of the app.

name: Background Image
description: The URL of the background image to use. Leave blank to use the default blue gradient as your background.
